name: Galaxy Gaming, Inc.
summary: Galaxy Gaming, Inc. is a global gaming company specializing in the design, development, acquisition, marketing, and licensing of proprietary casino table games, side bets, and associated technology for land-based and iGaming industries. Products include Side Bets (21+3, Lucky Ladies, Bonus Craps), Premium Games (Three Card Poker, EZ Baccarat, Heads Up Hold'em), and Enhanced Table Systems like the Galaxy Operating System (GOS). The company serves casinos, racinos, cruise ships, and online gaming operators across North America, Europe, Africa, the Caribbean, and Central America.
